text.tspan: FEATURE FLAG: code is deployed but the new feature is OFF by default;
a runtime config service enables it for chosen users.
u2022 deploy code anytime (with feature off)
u2022 turn feature on without redeploy
u2022 turn it back off in seconds if broken
u2022 different rollout per region / segment / user group
u2022 ON for 5% of traffic in EU
u2022 A/B test: 50/50 variant A vs B
Evaluated PER REQUEST with user context

g.text: ask: is new_checkout on for user X?
